leadText: Kiwi (Japanese: わぎりキウイ Round Sliced Kiwi) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very tart ingredient that has a light touch of sweetness as well. It goes well with rich ingredients.
